name: Permanent injury from work slip—lifelong benefits?
description: Yes, PPD + medical for life if proven.[1]

mainEntity.name: Permanent injury from work slip—lifelong benefits?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, PPD + medical for life if proven.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, impairment rating gets PPD payments.** Ongoing medical if related.[1] Factors: doc eval, % disability. Can be substantial. Lawyer maximizes.
